summary: Cross-Tool Auto-Prefill (Remix) Feature Testing - Complete E2E validation. All 7 tool pages load without JS errors. RemixBanner component properly renders when remix_data exists with data-testid='remix-banner'. useRemixData hook correctly consumes localStorage data, prefills fields, and clears after single consumption. TTL (10 min) properly rejects expired data. Dismiss button works correctly.

verified_working.details: Shows 'Prefilled from {tool_name} — {title}' correctly with dismiss button
Correctly reads localStorage, checks TTL, maps fields, and clears after consumption
Stores remix_data in localStorage with timestamp when hook is clicked
Correctly maps source tool settings to target tool fields for all tools

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 pages load, all remix features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Cross-tool auto-prefill system is fully working. All 7 tools (GIF Maker, Reel Generator, Comic Storybook, Bedtime Story, Caption Rewriter, Brand Story, Daily Viral Ideas) have useRemixData hook and RemixBanner integrated. NextActionHooks properly stores remix_data in localStorage with timestamp. TTL is 10 minutes. Single consumption pattern works - localStorage is cleared after hook consumption. To test full flow: 1) Go to a tool with generated result, 2) Click NextActionHook button, 3) Navigate to target tool, 4) Verify RemixBanner shows and fields are prefilled, 5) Verify localStorage is cleared.
